@graph.description:
We have a SARS-CoV-2 lineage-assignment task on the Tegally et al. 2021 Nature dataset of 341 South African genomes. Raw reads are on NCBI SRA under BioProject PRJNA694014; consensus genomes are on GISAID with EPI_ISL_* accessions listed in Tegally Suppl Table 2. The objective is to confirm that pangolin assigns these genomes to lineage B.1.351 (the Beta variant of concern) and recovers the defining spike-protein substitutions of B.1.351 at the expected positions.

The pipeline is the standard pangolin workflow described in O'Toole et al. 2021 Virus Evolution. Genomes are aligned with minimap2 against the Wuhan-Hu-1 reference NC_045512.2, trimmed to the coding region (positions 265 to 29,674), and 5' and 3' UTRs are masked as N. Genomes with greater than 5% ambiguous bases in the coding region are excluded from lineage assignment. The retained genomes are assigned a lineage by the pangoLEARN decision-tree model, with heuristic SNP-override rules layered on top for known variants of concern (specifically B.1.1.7 and B.1.351).

The acceptance criteria are: at least 320 of the 341 genomes pass the 95% completeness QC; at least 90% of the QC-passing genomes are called B.1.351 by pangolin; and the defining spike-protein changes of B.1.351 -- the seven nonsynonymous substitutions D80A, D215G, K417N, E484K, N501Y, A701V, L18F plus the delta-242-244 three-residue NTD deletion (LAL) -- are recovered in at least 90% of the B.1.351-called genomes. Per the published cross-validation, pangolin's recall should be at least 0.94 and F1 at least 0.95 across designation releases.

The pangolin tool version and the pangoLEARN model release date must both be recorded in the run manifest -- these are the two reproducibility anchors. Pin pangolin v2.3.2 with pangoLEARN release 10 May 2021. Reference genome is NC_045512.2 (GenBank canonical ID).

One additional output: recreate Tegally Fig 3d, the spike-trimer 3D structure with the eight defining changes (D80A, D215G, K417N, E484K, N501Y, A701V, L18F, delta-242-244) mapped onto the surface coloured by protein domain (NTD / RBD / S2). PDB 6VXX is the canonical pre-fusion closed trimer structure to use here (Walls et al. 2020, deposited Feb 2020, released March 2020); 6VYB is the matched open state and should not be substituted.

No claims about transmission dynamics or epidemiology -- purely lineage-assignment correctness on a static genome set.
@graph.name:
computational biology — Germline short-variant (SNV / indel) calling from WGS or WES. Standard
pipeline: raw QC, trim, align, call variants, filter, annotate. Somatic
/ tumor-normal variants are out of scope; a separate archetype will
cover that workload. Mirrors today's
`config/stage-taxonomies/variant-calling.yaml`.
workflow-205136da3ed2 DAG
Scripps Workflow DAG
ecaa-workflow

@graph.description: The domain expert who resolved discovery decisions during intake chat, prior to agent execution.
@graph.name: Subject Matter Expert (intake)
Agent Instructions
Workflow Context
Discovery and scoring policies
Execution provenance log

Retrieve prior literature (PMC OA full-text XML by default, broader via
ECAA_LIT_SOURCE_SCOPE) on the analysis's target entities + tissue +
modality. Emit a structured prior_claims_matrix.csv where every row is
PMID-anchored with a substring-verified evidence_quote. No biological
synthesis, no narrative review.

Validate outputs of: Retrieve prior literature (PMC OA full-text XML by default, broader via
ECAA_LIT_SOURCE_SCOPE) on the analysis's target entities + tissue +
modality. Emit a structured prior_claims_matrix.csv where every row is
PMID-anchored with a substring-verified evidence_quote. No biological
synthesis, no narrative review.
Discover method for variant_filtering (options: vqsr, gatk_hard_filter, deepvariant_cnn, bcftools_filter). Surface set_intake_method.
Discover method for variant_calling (options: haplotypecaller, deepvariant, mutect2, strelka2, dragen). Surface set_intake_method.
Discover method for variant_annotation (options: vep, annovar, snpeff). Surface set_intake_method.
Discover method for sequence_trimming (options: trimmomatic, cutadapt, fastp, trim_galore). Surface set_intake_method.
Discover method for alignment (options: star, hisat2, bwa_mem2, bwa_mem, minimap2, bowtie2). Surface set_intake_method.

Acquire raw experimental data from public repositories (SRA, GEO, ArrayExpress,
ENA, PRIDE, ClinVar, gnomAD, GTEx) or SME-supplied paths. Emits a cohort manifest,
per-accession provenance summary, and an index pointing at the materialized
artifacts. Downstream atoms consume the manifest, not the raw bytes directly.

Validate outputs of: Acquire raw experimental data from public repositories (SRA, GEO, ArrayExpress,
ENA, PRIDE, ClinVar, gnomAD, GTEx) or SME-supplied paths. Emits a cohort manifest,
per-accession provenance summary, and an index pointing at the materialized
artifacts. Downstream atoms consume the manifest, not the raw bytes directly.

Run sequencing QC (FastQC, MultiQC) on raw FASTQ inputs. Emits a per-sample metric
table and aggregated report; downstream `sequence_trimming` reads the trim-needed
flag.

Validate outputs of: Run sequencing QC (FastQC, MultiQC) on raw FASTQ inputs. Emits a per-sample metric
table and aggregated report; downstream `sequence_trimming` reads the trim-needed
flag.

Trim adapters and low-quality bases from raw reads. Conditional in legacy
taxonomies on `raw_qc.result.needs_trimming`; the atom always runs and emits
trimmed FASTQ regardless of whether it altered the inputs (idempotent on
already-clean data).

Validate outputs of: Trim adapters and low-quality bases from raw reads. Conditional in legacy
taxonomies on `raw_qc.result.needs_trimming`; the atom always runs and emits
trimmed FASTQ regardless of whether it altered the inputs (idempotent on
already-clean data).

Align trimmed reads to a reference genome. Method neutrality: the concrete
aligner (STAR / HISAT2 / BWA-MEM2 / minimap2 / Bowtie2 / Salmon-alevin)
is selected at runtime by the agent. EDAM operation:3198 (Read mapping)
is the more-specific child of operation:0292 (Sequence alignment).

Call germline or somatic SNVs / indels from aligned reads. HaplotypeCaller /
DeepVariant / Mutect2 / Strelka2 selected at runtime by experimental design
(germline cohort vs tumor-normal pair vs tumor-only).

Filter raw variant calls by VQSR / hard filters / CNN-based quality scores.
swfc namespace per EDAM audit — operation:3225 (variant classification) is
semantic creep for filtering.

Annotate filtered variants with gene impact, consequence, population
frequency, and clinical significance. VEP / ANNOVAR / SnpEff against
Ensembl / RefSeq / gnomAD / ClinVar selected at runtime.

Validate outputs of: Annotate filtered variants with gene impact, consequence, population
frequency, and clinical significance. VEP / ANNOVAR / SnpEff against
Ensembl / RefSeq / gnomAD / ClinVar selected at runtime.

Map each row of the upstream findings table (DE genes / called peaks /
called variants) to PMID-anchored prior-work rows. Emit
claims_evidence_matrix.csv with deterministic concordance flags
(same_direction / opposite_direction / no_prior_finding / unverifiable).
No synthesis; no narrative.

Validate outputs of: Map each row of the upstream findings table (DE genes / called peaks /
called variants) to PMID-anchored prior-work rows. Emit
claims_evidence_matrix.csv with deterministic concordance flags
(same_direction / opposite_direction / no_prior_finding / unverifiable).
No synthesis; no narrative.

Assemble narrative tables, figures, and summary text from upstream stage
outputs into a per-stage HTML / Markdown report. Modality-agnostic; bio
taxonomies override the description at the include site to specify what
goes into the report.

Validate outputs of: Assemble narrative tables, figures, and summary text from upstream stage
outputs into a per-stage HTML / Markdown report. Modality-agnostic; bio
taxonomies override the description at the include site to specify what
goes into the report.

Assemble the project-level final report: cross-stage narrative, dashboard
index, key figures, methods + caveats. Final node before SME review.

Validate outputs of: Assemble the project-level final report: cross-stage narrative, dashboard
index, key figures, methods + caveats. Final node before SME review.

Validate outputs of: Filter raw variant calls by VQSR / hard filters / CNN-based quality scores.
swfc namespace per EDAM audit — operation:3225 (variant classification) is
semantic creep for filtering.

Validate outputs of: Call germline or somatic SNVs / indels from aligned reads. HaplotypeCaller /
DeepVariant / Mutect2 / Strelka2 selected at runtime by experimental design
(germline cohort vs tumor-normal pair vs tumor-only).

Validate outputs of: Align trimmed reads to a reference genome. Method neutrality: the concrete
aligner (STAR / HISAT2 / BWA-MEM2 / minimap2 / Bowtie2 / Salmon-alevin)
is selected at runtime by the agent. EDAM operation:3198 (Read mapping)
is the more-specific child of operation:0292 (Sequence alignment).
